areas.name: entrypoints
areas.description: User-facing command/runtime entrypoints and orchestration boundaries.

areas.name: logic
areas.description: Pure decision helpers and deterministic transition logic.

areas.name: domain
areas.description: Core domain entities, DTOs, and state artifacts.

areas.name: ports
areas.description: Protocol and integration contracts consumed by application and adapters.

areas.name: adapters
areas.description: Infra/external system adapters and connectors (currently sparse and partly legacy).

areas.name: observability
areas.description: Telemetry, diagnostics, and runtime tracing surfaces.

temporary_exceptions.removal_plan: Delete this exception after compatibility delegator retirement in ISSUE-0013-A and ISSUE-0021 import migration closure; boundary report must show zero entrypoint->private application imports from sat_chatbot_memory_v2.
temporary_exceptions.notes: Temporary compatibility seam while runtime authority is extracted from monolith entrypoint surfaces.
temporary_exceptions.expiration_criteria: Expire when sat_chatbot_memory_v2.main and _run_canonical_turn_pipeline are compatibility-only wrappers and startup/runtime authority is solely through testbot.entrypoints.sat_cli + application service boundaries.

entries.expiration_criteria: Remove once all imports target testbot.answer_rendering and compatibility shim tests are retired.
entries.notes: Compatibility alias retained for receiver-first import migration.

entries.expiration_criteria: Remove once all imports target testbot.answer_validation and compatibility shim tests are retired.
entries.notes: Compatibility alias retained for receiver-first import migration.

deprecated_compatibility.notes: Compatibility aliases retained only during tracked migration windows; do not add new imports to these modules.

violation_policy.report_mode_rationale: Keep warning-only until runtime authority regressions and migration blockers tracked in ISSUE-0013/ISSUE-0014/ISSUE-0017/ISSUE-0021 are resolved with canonical gate evidence.

recurring_violation_classes.rationale: Cross-layer imports still bypass declared package dependency direction and must be removed, not normalized into policy.
recurring_violation_classes.expiration_criteria: Class count reaches zero in architecture-boundary report for two consecutive readiness gate runs.

recurring_violation_classes.rationale: Imports against non-public modules indicate authority leakage and should transition to declared public surfaces or extracted ports.
recurring_violation_classes.expiration_criteria: Class count reaches zero in architecture-boundary report for two consecutive readiness gate runs.

entry_criteria: ISSUE-0014 closure evidence attached for identity continuity and retrieval activation regressions.
ISSUE-0017 closure evidence attached for answer.commit authority-boundary invariants.
Two consecutive readiness gate runs report zero forbidden_dependency_direction and private_surface_import violations.
No increase in temporary_exceptions and all active exceptions include owner, issue, expires_on, and expiration_criteria metadata.
